---
title: "SVMmodel"
author: "Mia Gale"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## SVM Model

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidymodels)   # Core framework for modeling (includes recipes, workflows, parsnip, etc.)
library(finetune)     # Additional tuning strategies (e.g., racing, ANOVA-based tuning)
library(vip)          # For plotting variable importance from fitted models
library(ranger)       # Fast implementation of Random Forests
library(tidyverse)    # Data wrangling and visualization
library(doParallel)   # For parallel computing (useful during resampling/tuning)
library(caret)       # Other great library for Machine Learning 
library(kernlab)      # SVM engine used by tidymodels
# install.packages("e1071")
# library("e1071")
```

```{r}

corn_split <- read.csv(here("data", "corn_training_reduced.csv"))

set.seed(9678965) # Setting seed to get reproducible results 

corn_split <- initial_split(corn_split, 
  prop = .7,
  strata = yield_mg_ha) # proportion of split same as previous codes
  
corn_split
```

```{r}

corn_train <- training(corn_split)  # 70% of data

corn_train #This is your training data frame

```

```{r}
corn_test <- testing(corn_split)

corn_test

```

```{r}


ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = corn_train, 
               aes(x = yield_mg_ha),
               color = "red") +
  geom_density(data = corn_test, 
               aes(x = yield_mg_ha),
               color = "blue") 


```

```{r}

# Create recipe for data preprocessing
corn_recipe <- recipe(yield_mg_ha ~ ., data = corn_train) %>%
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())    #We should normalize our variables for SVM

corn_recipe

```

```{r}


# Prep the recipe to estimate any required statistics
corn_prep <- corn_recipe %>% 
  prep()

# Examine preprocessing steps
corn_prep


```

```{r}


svm_spec <- # Specifying SVM as our model type, asking to tune the hyperparameters
  svm_rbf(                 # Most common choice for nonlinear regression
    cost = tune(),        # Controls model complexity
    rbf_sigma = tune()    # Controls the smoothness of the radial kernel
  ) %>%
  # specify engine
  set_engine("kernlab") %>%
  # Set to mode
  set_mode("regression")

svm_spec

```

```{r}

set.seed(657) #34549

resampling_foldcv <- vfold_cv(corn_train, # Create 10-fold cross-validation resampling object from training data
                              v = 10)

resampling_foldcv
resampling_foldcv$splits[[1]]

```

```{r}

svm_grid <- grid_latin_hypercube(
  cost(),
  rbf_sigma(),
  size = 100
)

svm_grid

```

```{r}

ggplot(data = svm_grid,
       aes(x = cost, 
           y = rbf_sigma)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .5)


```

```{r}

set.seed(6576)
registerDoParallel(cores = parallel::detectCores() - 1)

svm_res <- tune_race_anova(
  object = svm_spec,
  preprocessor = corn_recipe,
  resamples = resampling_foldcv,
  grid = svm_grid,
  control = control_race(save_pred = TRUE)
)

stopImplicitCluster()

beepr::beep()
svm_res$.metrics[[2]]

```

```{r}

plot_race(svm_res)

```


```{r}

# Based on lowest RMSE
best_rmse <- svm_res %>% 
  select_best(metric = "rmse") %>% 
  mutate(source = "best_rmse")

best_rmse

```


```{r}

best_rmse_pct_loss <- svm_res %>% 
  select_by_pct_loss(
    cost,
    metric = "rmse",
    limit = 1
  ) %>% 
  mutate(source = "best_rmse_pct_loss")

best_rmse_pct_loss

```

```{r}

# Based on lowest RMSE within 1 se
best_rmse_one_std_err <- svm_res %>% 
  select_by_one_std_err(
    metric = "rmse",
    cost
  ) %>% 
  mutate(source = "best_rmse_one_std_err")

best_rmse_one_std_err

```

```{r}

# Based on greatest R2
best_r2 <- svm_res %>% 
  select_best(metric = "rsq") %>% 
  mutate(source = "best_r2")

best_r2

```

```{r}

# Based on lowest R2 within 1% loss
best_r2_pct_loss <- svm_res %>% 
  select_by_pct_loss(
    cost,
    metric = "rsq",
    limit = 1
  ) %>% 
  mutate(source = "best_r2_pct_loss")

best_r2_pct_loss

```

```{r}

# Based on lowest R2 within 1 se
best_r2_one_std_error <- svm_res %>% 
  select_by_one_std_err(
    metric = "rsq",
    cost
  ) %>%
  mutate(source = "best_r2_one_std_error")

best_r2_one_std_error

```

```{r}

best_rmse %>% 
  bind_rows(
    best_rmse_pct_loss, 
    best_rmse_one_std_err, 
    best_r2, 
    best_r2_pct_loss, 
    best_r2_one_std_error
  )

```

```{r}

final_spec <- svm_rbf(
  cost = best_r2$cost,               # Cost parameter
  rbf_sigma = best_r2$rbf_sigma      # Radial basis kernel parameter
) %>%
  set_engine("kernlab") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

final_spec

```

```{r}

set.seed(877)

final_fit <- last_fit(
  final_spec,
  corn_recipe,
  split = corn_split
)

final_fit

```

```{r}

collect_metrics(final_fit)

```

```{r}

collect_predictions(final_fit) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = yield_mg_ha, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Observed Yield",
    y = "Predicted Yield",
    title = "Observed vs Predicted Yield - SVM"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
